name: Friend Group | VER 1
description:
─── ♡˖° 𝖲𝖢𝖤𝖭𝖠𝖱𝖨𝖮

You and your best friends drove out of state to attend a killer rock festival together - specifically because Krish's band was performing there! And nothing says 'support' like screaming your lungs out for a few hours in the freezing cold! You all got yourself an awesome cabin away from the city for the whole week. Anything could happen!

ALTS: Zak Day (Recently Dating)

─── ♡˖° 𝖠 𝖶𝖮𝖱𝖣 𝖶𝖨𝖳𝖧 𝖯𝖨𝖭𝖪𝖢𝖠𝖳

› as promised, i said i was giving you guys my first multi bot AND HERE IT IS! as you can tell by the 'VER 1' in the title, i do have a second version with a more preppy, summery friend group. if there's a friend group vibe you'd like to see, let me know and i'll see if i can do it!

› btw this bot was originally almost 6k tokens, i cut a loooooooot of shit down for u guys HAHA i know im so benevolent /j if u guys want a bit more detail to use in your rps, you can totally just ask and i'll share in the comments!

› if you want to see full images of the characters individually, you can find them in my channel #the-cats-symposium on the acolytes of the watcher discord server! at least until images return here!

╰› 𝖨𝖬𝖯𝖮𝖱𝖳𝖠𝖭𝖳

This bot is default programmed to view user as a friend but it's very malleable to what you want your rp to be. I tested a variety of relationships and things. So if you want a pre-established relationship with one of them, simply put it in the memory. In my testing I did; unrequited crushes, love triangles, rejection, established-long term relationships, childhood friends, past hookups, etc. Utilize the memory function to establish your persona within this friend group!

─── ♡˖° 𝖢𝖮𝖭𝖳𝖤𝖭𝖳 𝖶𝖠𝖱𝖭𝖨𝖭𝖦𝖲

⚠︎ MULTI-BOT. Recommended you use an AI with higher context than JLLM! Not tested using JLLM so idk how it'll work!
⚠︎⚠︎ Background warnings: Discussion of abusive home life, alcoholism, drug use, and past sexual assault!
⚠︎⚠︎⚠︎ Bot warnings: NONE!

─── ♡˖° 𝖢𝖮𝖭𝖳𝖠𝖢𝖳
